entries.text: Cheat death a single time
Depleted until next contact with grace
A natural whetstone of high quality with a fine grain
A kernel of life that straddles the living and inanimate
Plant extract highly fit for repairing armaments
Last words of a scallywag apprentice
Altus flowers flush with nutrients and grace
A golden seed, found at the base of an illusory tree
A golden seed harboring a warm blessing
A crystallized form of the power of Night
A clear sign of the Nightlord's presence
A finely-crafted streamlined arrowhead
An invitation from the traitor
A fragment of the spear of Fulghor
A doll adored by a young child
A stone stake that opens a sealed-away lock
Annals detailing cursed weapons
A brooch imbued with potent magic
Blade fragment imbued with the power of Night
Power of Night that failed to acquire a host
An earring with a restored pin
Iron coins of a faraway land received from the Wylder
A hand-crafted charm that is somehow unsettling
A dubious ledger used by a merchant
A torn magic-warding braided cord
%null%
Necklace made from a thick rugged claw
A coin given by an all-or-nothing pirate
A medal adorning a doll resembling a young girl
Flatbread with a freshly baked aroma
Annals detailing cursed weapons
%null%
A scrap of paper with a note on the White Horn
An iron coin imbued with a small blessing
A cracked brooch bereft of its former magic
Small key featuring fine ornamentation
A scrap of paper detailing the "New Night"
A single earring belonging to the Wylder
A disturbing stone with a distinct lifelessness
An object found within the Primordial Nightlord
The qualities of the Nightlord
The qualities of the Nightlord
The qualities of the Nightlord
Maximum HP raised
Maximum FP raised
Lowers FP consumption
Maximum stamina raised
Lowers stamina consumption
Raises stamina recovery speed
Raises physical attack
Raises attacks of magic, fire, lightning, holy affinities
Raises attack power of slashing physical attacks
Raises attack power of striking physical attacks
Raises attack power of thrusting physical attacks
Raises attack power of standard physical attacks
Attacks more likely to break stance of enemies
Enhances attacks against blockers lifeforms born of falling stars
Enhances attacks against Those Who Live in Death
Enhances attacks against dragons
Raises attack power of daggers
Raises attack power of straight swords
Raises attack power of greatswords
Raises attack power of colossal swords
Raises attack power of curved swords
Raises attack power of curved greatswords
Raises attack power of katana
Raises attack power of twinblades
Raises attack power of thrusting swords
Raises attack power of heavy thrusting swords
Raises attack power of axes
Raises attack power of greataxes
Raises attack power of hammers
Raises attack power of great hammers
Raises attack power of flails
Raises attack power of spears
Raises attack power of pikes
Raises attack power of great spears
Raises attack power of halberds
Raises attack power of reapers
Raises attack power of fists
Raises attack power of claws
Raises attack power of whips
Raises attack power of colossal weapons
Raises attack power of bows
Boosts physical damage negation
Boosts magic, fire, lightning, and holy damage negation
Raises resistance to all ailments
Raises poise
Raises potency of sorceries and incantations
Extends spell effect duration
龍の聖餐祈願文は武器に対龍効果を加える
Boosts Stonedigger sorcery
Boosts Carian sword sorcery
Boosts Glintblade sorcery
Boosts invisibility sorcery
Boosts Crystalian sorcery
Boosts gravity sorcery
Boosts thorn sorcery
Boosts night sorcery
Boosts Fundamentalist incantations
Boosts Dragon Cult incantations
Boosts Giants' Flame incantations
Boosts godslayer incantations
Boosts bestial incantations
Boosts Frenzied Flame incantations
Boosts Dragon Communion incantations
Enhances charged skills
Parry to dispel incoming sorceries and incantations, retaliating with golden power
究極技ゲージのチャージ速度が向上する
Shortens Character Skill cooldown time
Enhances roars and breath attacks
Raises potency of throwing pots
Raises potency of items employing perfume
Longer invincibility windows during evasive maneuvers
Evasive maneuvers strike surroundings with lightning
Guard counters trigger holy bursts
Activation summons a group of Those Lost in Death that attack enemies
Enhances counterattacks unique to thrusting weapons
Boosts HP restoration from flasks
Flasks restore HP to self and nearby allies
Flask slowly restores HP and provides increased HP restoration
Produces ice storm at the starting point of surge sprint
Become difficult to spot and silence footsteps while walking
Causes the yellow flame of frenzy to violently burst forth while walking
Summons a dark cloud of stars overhead while walking. The cloud will release a violent deluge of star rain.
Increases number of runes obtained
Gain 10000 runes
Gain 20000 runes
Gain 30000 runes
定期的に近くの敵を自動攻撃するグリンブレイドを生成する
Restores HP upon attacking enemies with a dagger
Restores HP upon attacking enemies with a straight sword
Restores HP upon attacking enemies with a greatsword
Restores HP upon attacking enemies with a colossal sword
Restores HP upon attacking enemies with a curved sword
Restores HP upon attacking enemies with a curved greatsword
Restores HP upon attacking enemies with a katana
Restores HP upon attacking enemies with a twinblade
Restores HP upon attacking enemies with a thrusting sword
Restores HP upon attacking enemies with a heavy thrusting sword
Restores HP upon attacking enemies with an axe
Restores HP upon attacking enemies with a greataxe
Restores HP upon attacking enemies with a hammer
Restores HP upon attacking enemies with a great Hammer
Restores HP upon attacking enemies with a flail
Restores HP upon attacking enemies with a spear
Restores HP upon attacking enemies with a pike
Restores HP upon attacking enemies with a great spear
Restores HP upon attacking enemies with a halberd
Restores HP upon attacking enemies with a reaper
Restores HP upon attacking enemies with a fist
Restores HP upon attacking enemies with a claw
Restores HP upon attacking enemies with a whip
Restores HP upon attacking enemies with a colossal weapon
Restores HP upon attacking enemies with a bow
Restores FP upon attacking enemies with a dagger
Restores FP upon attacking enemies with a straight sword
Restores FP upon attacking enemies with a greatsword
Restores FP upon attacking enemies with a colossal sword
Restores FP upon attacking enemies with a curved sword
Restores FP upon attacking enemies with a curved greatsword
Restores FP upon attacking enemies with a katana
Restores FP upon attacking enemies with a twinblade
Restores FP upon attacking enemies with a thrusting sword
Restores FP upon attacking enemies with a heavy thrusting sword
Restores FP upon attacking enemies with an axe
Restores FP upon attacking enemies with a greataxe
Restores FP upon attacking enemies with a hammer
Restores FP upon attacking enemies with a great hammer
Restores FP upon attacking enemies with a flail
Restores FP upon attacking enemies with a spear
Restores FP upon attacking enemies with a pike
Restores FP upon attacking enemies with a great spear
Restores FP upon attacking enemies with a halberd
Restores FP upon attacking enemies with a reaper
Restores FP upon attacking enemies with a fist
Restores FP upon attacking enemies with a claw
Restores FP upon attacking enemies with a whip
Restores FP upon attacking enemies with a colossal weapon
Restores FP upon attacking enemies with a bow
Attacked enemies die instantly on rare occasions
Successive attacks restore HP
Successive attacks restore FP
Raises attack power with successive attacks
Critical hits restore HP
Critical hits restore FP
Critical hits increase damage inflicted upon the same enemy
Successful guards restore HP
Successful guards restore FP
クリティカルヒット後に武器から出血効果を与える
At low HP, create holy ground, slowly restore HP, and improve defense
Critical hits restore all HP when HP is low
Increases attack power and defense for the caster and nearby allies
Enhances physical and fire-affinity attack power
Raises attack deflection and resistance to all ailments but reduces lightning damage negation
Boosts sorceries of those within a sigil
Poisoning or scarlet rot in vicinity continuously restores HP
Nearby blood loss increases attack power
Newly found Sites of Grace raise attack power

Nullifies scarlet rot and increases max HP. Attacks after receiving damage partially recover HP.

%null%
Halves frostbite damage and frost buildup. Nearby frostbite boosts attack.
Reduces damage caused by frostbite, as well as frost accumulation
Adds anti-dragon effect
Slows frost accumulation and adds anti-dragon effect
Slightly slows frost accumulation

Increases damage taken
